---
name: agtoosa-revert

description: "AgToosa: git-aware logical rollback by phase or commit"
tools: [codebase, terminal]
---
name: agtoosa-revert

Read Docs/AgToosa_Revert.md and execute the rollback workflow.

Identify the phase or commit to revert to (e.g. "spec", "build task 3", a commit hash, or a branch name). If not specified, ask the user before proceeding.
